rag_rules: AGREE contracts for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections are defined
generic_rules: Use visible component ports in type-level contracts to define output dependencies
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through variables or outputs
Ensure AGREE scalar types are declared as int, real, or bool for valid syntax
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid AADL component type or implementation scopes
Guarantee statements should relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not place implementation-level AGREE contracts in component type scopes
